findings.message: Permissions of sensitive mount points should be restrictive. When using --mount=type=secret, always specify mode parameter with restrictive permissions (e.g., mode=0400 for read-only by owner, or mode=0440 for read-only by owner and group). Secrets without explicit mode restrictions or with overly permissive modes can be accessed by unauthorized users, leading to credential exposure.
